positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of celestial geometry combined with bioluminescent deep-sea flora. The composition features interconnected, stylized vines and crystalline structures forming a central, repeating mandala pattern. The style is highly graphic, resembling sophisticated woodcut engraving mixed with modern psychedelic vector art. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, cosmic purple, teal, and glowing metallic gold accents. Focus on stark, clean silhouettes and intricate linework against a contrasting void background. Optimal for apparel printing, high contrast, clean vector output, radial symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, noise, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, cartoon, photo, grainy, realistic
